race.comment: JARRITO (9) well-bred filly resuming. Put away a good field first-up last prep defeating I Am Carrot in fast time over 1100m at Gosford. Never a hope from the wide gate with a fading last at Hawkesbury on November 27 last year. Looked sharp in her 795m trial win at Warwick Farm. Gets her chance from the draw. CHARLINA (3) progressive filly who returns from a let-up. Bounced off her unlucky second two-back with a dominant on-pace win over 1000m at Gosford. Claim helps again after the strong recent 900m trial win. Can win again. HINZEL (6) resumes from a lengthy spell. Demolished a small field on debut from back in the field over 1000m at Kembla Grange last November. Fitted with a closing sixth in a recent 800m Illawarra Grange trial. Key jockey change and likely to go back from the gate. POINT SCORE (7) returns a gelding with the two sound trials. Kept finding with a close-up fourth over 1250m here last January. Well drawn and can take a hand in the finish.
